---
title: "CV"
---

::: {.page-header}
<div class="kicker">Curriculum vitae</div>
# Mesfin Genie
Senior Lecturer in Health Economics, Newcastle Business School, The University of Newcastle.
:::

::: {.content}
::: {.grid-2}
::: {.card}
### Current appointment
Senior Lecturer in Health Economics  
Newcastle Business School  
The University of Newcastle, Australia
:::
::: {.card}
### Education
PhD in Economics, Ca’ Foscari University of Venice  
MSc in Health Economics and Management, University of Bologna  
MSc in Economics, Addis Ababa University
:::
:::

## Research areas

Health economics; behavioural economics; discrete choice experiments; preference elicitation; eye tracking; vaccine policy; health technology assessment; decision support tools; applied econometrics.

## Profiles

[University profile](https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie){.button .light} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ){.button .light} [GitHub](https://github.com/DrGenie){.button .light}
:::
